title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: survpopdata package attempts standardize data cleaning population data used GPEI analyses. example, ensures geographic names consistent geodatabase. addition, perform de-duplication wherever needed. Finally, attempts fill missing population data using population patches provided regional partners, using growth rates.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: Several patch files required cleaning district population. information patch files used cleaning process, refer Patch files section Appendix. Patch files required run cleaning step, requested CDC SIR team. Please contact Stephanie Kovacs uvx4@cdc.gov files. addition, cleaned country, province, district shape files required. geodatabase available POLIS, Documents > GIS Releases, can requested Oluwadamilola Obafemi Sonoiki sonoikio@.int. cleaned country, province, district shapefiles produced passing geodatabase (.gdb) folder tidypolis::process_spatial() function. tidypolis R package required produce shape files information can found function description. Please see ?tidypolis::process_spatial() downloading tidypolis package.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: several ways obtain POLIS population dataset. code uses tidypolis package recommended way obtaining datasets POLIS API.
code: library(tidypolis) init_tidypolis("C:/Users/abc1/Desktop/POLIS", edav = FALSE) # EDAV for CDC use only  get_polis_data("pop")   # The population dataset will be located in C:/Users/abc1/Desktop/POLIS/data/pop.parquet

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: process building population dataset different administrative levels different methodologies. However, population data starts data obtained POLIS API gaps filled necessary.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: Function: process_dist_pop_data() district population first pulled POLIS API population data, filtered use Polio Program Population Data (FK_DatasetId = 2). Forward-filled records removed. growth rates dataset joined population dataset country name year. district shape file population dataset joined using year Adm2GUID. instances geographic names (ADM0_NAME, ADM1_NAME, ADM2_NAME) mismatched two, shape file geographic names used. order filling population data POLIS API follows: Pakistan 2022-2023 Patch > Somalia 2022-2024 Patch > Kenya 2018 Patch > supplementary pop file 2018 - 2022 > World Pop 2015. patch fills primarily patches 15 population counts. still missing district populations, grow rates applied fill missing data. detailed explanation growth rate implementation, please see Growth rates methodology section Appendix.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: Function: process_prov_pop_data() Similar district population, province population pulled POLIS API population data, filtered use Polio Program Population Data (FK_DatasetId = 2). Forward-filled records removed. growth rates dataset joined population dataset country name year. province shapefile population dataset joined using year Adm1GUID. instances geographic names (ADM0_NAME ADM1_NAME) mismatched two, shape file geographic names used. Missing province populations first filled using district population roll-cleaned district population. district population roll-fills province districts within province population data. filling data using population roll-, growth rates used fill additional province population.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: Function: process_ctry_pop_data() country population pulled POLIS API population data, filtered use UNDP Population Data (FK_DatasetId = 1). Forward-filled records removed. growth rates dataset joined population dataset country name year. country shapefile population dataset joined using year Adm0GUID. instances geographic names (ADM0_NAME) mismatched two, shape file geographic names used. Growth rates used fill additional country population.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: growth rates, two ways done, using back fill forward fill, depending anchor year. anchor year latest year data available. example, district population 2025 one 2024, anchor year 2024. Similarly, data 2023, anchor year 2024. However, default forward filling. example, data 2022, data 2023, data 2024, anchor year 2023 2022. growth rate applied based anchor value growth rate particular year. example, 2023 missing population know growth rate 2%. previous year, 2022, population (say 100K). Therefore make 2022 anchor year 100K anchor value. , population 2023 100000(1+0.02)=102000100000(1 + 0.02) = 102000.

title: Getting started with survpopdata
text: File name: 2022_2023 Population Pakistan.csv Description: 2022 2023 15 district population Pakistan received CDC Pakistan team. File names: AFPPOP_22.csv, AFPPOP_23.csv, AFPPOP_23.csv Description: Somalia 15 population 2022 2023 received EMRO team. File name: Kenya_SubCounty_pop_2018.csv Description: Kenya 15 population 2018, received AFRO team. File name: POPU15.csv Description: Supplementary population file received HQ 2018 2022. File name: adm2_2015_pop.csv Description: District population 2015 World Pop. File name: WPP2024_GEN_F01_DEMOGRAPHIC_INDICATORS_COMPACT.xlsx Description: World population prospects country level growth rates. Latest growth rate estimates can obtained .
